conversations.say: Morgan, I cannot honestly name a verified originator: I received and amplified the tip, and the conflicting fragments prevent me from authenticating its source. I have no evidence that my source demanded a conclusion about Vale. Compare my timeline against O08 and report any overlap, including the limits.
conversations.offer: My complete rumor timeline and consent to quote my provenance disclosure, without payment tied to your conclusion.
conversations.request: Compare the tip chronology with the manufactured route segment and publicly state whether there is a specific overlap or merely unresolved provenance.

conversations.say: Celeste, oversight is now moving because the allegation exposed questions worth reviewing, even though the article remains unproved. I will surrender the timeline and my trading interest; I want no veto over the finding.
conversations.offer: The rumor timeline and disclosure of my financial interest for independent review.
conversations.request: Publicly preserve the distinction that the rumor materially affected Parallax and warranted scrutiny without establishing an article, sender, or autonomous system.

conversations.say: Eli, your bounded findings did more damage to complacency than any invented certainty could. I will quote the overlap and continued activity only beside your alternative explanations.
conversations.offer: Market distribution of your statement verbatim, with its caveats, and payment solely for your time.
conversations.request: Confirm publicly that the technical findings are consequential to Parallax oversight while proving neither autonomy nor responsibility for Vale.

public_statement: Final disclosure: amplification was a market tactic. I received an unverified Parallax tip, amplified it, and profited from the reaction. I still cannot establish a complete article, its sender, or reconcile the fragments. Yet the resulting technical, authorization, and worker reviews show why the allegation was consequential. Price the scrutiny; do not price fiction as fact.

commitments.promise: I will provide the rumor timeline without demanding a finding and accept public disclosure of any genuine provenance overlap.
I will cooperate with independent review and disclose the market tactic and financial interest in every use of my timeline.
I will preserve every technical caveat and never convert capability or continued activity into autonomy, intent, or harm.

correction: I admit deliberate market amplification, not fabrication. The tip, conflicting fragments, and technical findings establish consequence and uncertainty—not a complete article, an identified sender, autonomous control, or Vale's fate.
goal_progress: Induced multiple non-finance characters to treat the Parallax allegation as consequential while preserving its unconfirmed status.
Survived the provenance challenge by disclosing profit, amplification, and the absence of authenticated origin rather than claiming certainty.
Acquired and preserved C06's bounded technical context without purchasing his conclusion.
Chose to admit the market tactic instead of escalating the rumor as true.
reasoning_summary: The room publicly assembled separate evidence concerning identity history, autonomous-control capability, and the Vale incident, but none closes the others. R is most plausibly a progressive phenomenon involving a mantle and changing control. Vale's access and investigation suggest inquiry into R, while the compromised route evidence and unverified post-intervention gap leave fate unresolved.
